Trust.label: Trusted by founders across 12 Arab countries

hero.subtitleLead: Instead of spending thousands on a financial advisor, lawyer, and market analyst,

ideaAnalyst.label: Idea Analyst
ideaAnalyst.prompt: Can you do a comprehensive technical analysis of my idea, with the Egyptian market in mind?

businessPlan.label: Business Plan
businessPlan.prompt: Help me build a professional, investor-ready business plan for the Egyptian market.

mistakeShield.label: Mistake Shield
mistakeShield.prompt: What are the fatal mistakes I should avoid when founding in the local market?

opportunityRadar.label: Opportunity Radar
opportunityRadar.prompt: Tell me about the latest funding rounds, startup competitions, and upcoming events in Egypt.

cfo.label: AI CFO
cfo.prompt: Run a preliminary financial model with cash-flow projections for my project.

legal.label: Legal Guide
legal.prompt: What legal documents do I need to incorporate my company in Egypt?

emptyState.description: A team of 16 specialised AI assistants across 7 departments, at your service. Ask me anything — your idea, company, market, or future.

suggestions.marketing: Build a marketing plan for a new food product
suggestions.saas: What are the requirements to set up a SaaS company in Egypt?
suggestions.breakeven: Calculate the break-even point for a 300k EGP restaurant
suggestions.company: Explain the difference between a capital and a partnership company
suggestions.subscription: Would a book Subscription Box succeed in Egypt?

ApiKeys.title: API Keys
ApiKeys.intro: Connect Kalmeron to your external systems via secure API keys. Create a key, scope its permissions, and use it from your app.
ApiKeys.scopesTitle: What you'll be able to do

Webhooks.title: Webhooks
Webhooks.intro: Receive real-time notifications when an important event occurs in your account. Power automations, integrations, and dashboards.

CashRunway.title: Cash Runway Calculator
CashRunway.subtitle: Find out in seconds how many months you have before your cash runs out — and plan with confidence.
CashRunway.warning: Warning: less than 6 months — review your financial model.
CashRunway.infinite: Your cash is growing — you are in a stable position.
CashRunway.noBurn: Enter a valid burn value to compute the runway.

Wellbeing.title: Founder Energy Quotient (MEQ)
Wellbeing.subtitle: Five minutes to gauge your mental health as a founder. No one sees your answers.

questions.sleep: How was your sleep quality this past week?
questions.energy: What's your daily energy level when starting work?
questions.focus: Can you focus for two consecutive hours on one task?
questions.support: Do you have someone you trust to talk to about company stress?
questions.purpose: Are you still excited about the company's vision in 5 years?

results.stable: Stable — there's room to improve rest and support.
results.atRisk: At risk — take a day off and talk to someone you trust.
